element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core gating mechanic; flying demon carries key
Avoidable or defeatable; varies by creature

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Late game, requires two lamps + study room interaction

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Can be dropped to remove threat; pressure mechanic

typical_relief_triggers: Finding readable diary or scroll (story context)
Entering safe room with no enemies
typical_tension_triggers: Opening locked doors into unknown rooms
Running out of moves (if cursed ruby held)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Nonlinear exploration with gradual intensity escalation; pressure builds through move-counting system rather than real-time urgency; magical illogic creates unpredictability

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden art gallery accessible only via two lamps + specific study painting interaction; indicates reward for thorough exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Flying tiny demon periodically appears holding keys; nonstandard enemy serves dual purpose (threat + item dispenser)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction via car crash and mansion exploration; first enemies encountered without overwhelming pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Intensity increases with locked door gating; backyard buildings introduce new environment types; puzzle complexity escalates via diary/scroll hints
difficulty_curve.late_game: Climactic escalation: cemetery maze navigation, underground cavern descent, Dracan encounter, possessed sibling battle; all major boss/challenge content concentrated here

notable_level_patterns.description: Two-floor house + tower structure; gated via locked doors; encourages methodical key-hunting and inventory management
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Study room → fireplace collection → painting activation

notable_level_patterns.description: Three discrete buildings (observatory, greenhouse, chapel) branch from main house; each introduces new area type and challenges
Art gallery locked behind multi-step requirements; rewards observation and experimentation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Study room odd painting + two lamps → teleportation to art gallery

notable_level_patterns.description: Diaries and scrolls scattered throughout unlock story context; illogical magic puzzles explained retroactively through documentation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any bedroom/library with readable text objects

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Uninvited NES)
